title: Durable Residue Closeout Gate
goal: Complete #492 by making durable-residue routing explicit in execplan templates, closeout preparation, and archive validation.
non_goals: Do not copy all archive history into Memory.
Do not turn Memory into a task tracker.
Do not add heavy knowledge-management workflow.

intent.outcome: completed plans must answer whether future-relevant residue exists and where it belongs before archive
intent.constraints: keep archive-only valid for evidence-only/no residue; keep checks cheap and package-local
intent.latitude: choose exact field names if they preserve the issue's routing meaning
intent.escalation: stop if this requires broad memory implementation rather than closeout/validation routing

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #492, and continue #493/#494/#495 under #491.
execution.proof: planning package tests, planning surface check, proof selection

invariants: archive-only durable residue must be evidence_only or none
future-relevant residue must name a Memory/docs/contracts/checks/planning owner
archives remain evidence/history, not ordinary operating input

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #491 route durable motivation and lessons out of planning archives

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #492 lands, continue #493/#494/#495 unless parent #491 can honestly close

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: archive gate can enforce explicit durable-residue routing
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Memory capture workflow and self-improvement closeout routing children

intent_interpretation.literal request: Add durable-residue routing to plan closeout and archive gates.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make archive-only future motivation difficult to create accidentally.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add a durable_residue record, template guidance, renderer support, archive validation, and tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Reject broad Memory automation; this slice is an archive closeout contract.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package installer/tests and planning execplan template/readme mirrors
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: stop before restructuring archive-plan command semantics beyond residue validation
execution_bounds.stop before touching: memory package implementation or self-improvement skill internals

stop_conditions.stop when: durable-residue routing needs automatic Memory writes
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: the change cannot stay within closeout/archive validation
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: new durable surfaces beyond existing templates/checks become necessary
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: planning package tests no longer prove archive behavior

context_budget.live working set: #492 issue, archive_execplan gate, execplan template, planning tests
context_budget.externalize before shift: active next action, validation failure, and residue field semantics
context_budget.pre-work config pull: use compact workflow/config/proof surfaces before raw planning reads
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: none; this is closeout contract work
context_budget.context-shift triggers: after tests pass or if archive validation semantics need broad redesign

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Plans cannot archive future-relevant residue as archive-only evidence.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep the package repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic and avoid heavy Memory automation.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Field normalization and exact warning text.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The gate would require provider-specific or memory-specific runtime behavior.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #492, and refresh external evidence.
invariants: Archive-only closeout is valid only for none/evidence-only residue.
Future-relevant residue names a non-archive owner.
completion_criteria: Template and rendered closeout include durable_residue fields.
Archive validation accepts routed Memory/docs/contracts/checks/planning residue.
Archive validation rejects future-relevant residue whose owner is archive-only or missing.

execution_run.what happened: Added durable_residue fields to execplan templates and planning record handling, rendered the section in inactive residue, made archive-plan validate durable-residue routing, and updated planning checker status scanning so the new section is not treated as an active milestone.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package installer, planning tests, template/readme mirrors, planning-surface checker mirrors, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run ruff check scripts packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests
execution_run.result for continuation: #492 is complete; #491 still has child work for Memory capture, archive-only warnings, and self-improvement closeout routing.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no Memory automation or new first-line surface was added
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary/proof/doctor and active checked-in execplan
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; future-relevant residue is routed by explicit status and owner fields

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run ruff check scripts packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 134 planning tests and 206 workspace CLI tests passed; ruff passed for package/root scopes; planning doctor and planning-surface check were clean.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: #492 add durable-residue routing to plan closeout and archive gates
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Archive validation now accepts no/evidence-only residue, accepts routed Memory residue, and rejects future-relevant residue without a non-archive owner; templates/guidance expose the durable_residue answer.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Archives/reviews are evidence, not ordinary operating input; durable future meaning belongs in Memory/docs/contracts/checks/planning.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: tighten existing closeout gate instead of adding a new first-line surface
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this make future-relevant motivation cheaper to find outside archives?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #492 is complete, but #491 still has child slices for Memory capture, archive-only warnings, and self-improvement closeout routing.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: durable_residue template fields plus archive validation tests for evidence-only, Memory-routed, and invalid archive-only future residue.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if archive-plan permits future-relevant residue with no non-archive owner.

durable_residue.learned constraint: A new closeout field named Status can collide with broad status-row scanners unless checks scope status parsing to the owning section.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: When adding structured closeout fields, validation must avoid treating similarly named fields as active milestone state.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py and planning package checker mirrors
durable_residue.promotion trigger: when another non-milestone section adds a status-like field

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Durable-residue routing is explicit in planning closeout templates and enforced by archive-plan validation.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: planning package tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof, doctor, and planning-surface checks passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: The status-scanner collision is captured in Durable Residue and fixed in checker mirrors.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): checker fix and tests; no Memory note needed yet.

signals found: Durable Residue `Status` initially triggered broad active-milestone status scanning.
signals fixed: Planning checker mirrors now scope status-row classification to the Active Milestone section.
improvement_signal_review.next owner: #493/#494/#495 for the remaining durable-residue-routing parent lane.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted #492 as first child of durable-residue-routing lane.
2026-04-28: Completed durable_residue template/archive gate and fixed checker status-scope collision.
